title: Communauté de communes des 7 Vallées
summary: The Communauté de communes des 7 Vallées (also: 7 Vallées comm) is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Pas-de-Calais department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. It was created in January 2014 by the merger of the former communautés de communes L'Hesdinois, Canche Ternoise and Val de Canche et d'Authie. Its area is 497.3 km2, and its population was 29,653 in 2018. Its seat is in Hesdin-la-Forêt.
text:
The Communauté de communes des 7 Vallées (also: 7 Vallées comm) is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Pas-de-Calais department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. It was created in January 2014 by the merger of the former communautés de communes L'Hesdinois, Canche Ternoise and Val de Canche et d'Authie. Its area is 497.3 km2, and its population was 29,653 in 2018. Its seat is in Hesdin-la-Forêt.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 66 communes:
